Joe Root Stars As England Beat Sri Lanka In 2nd ODI

Jan 25, 2026 • 8JJ Sports

Joe Root Stars As England Beat Sri Lanka In 2nd ODI

Joe Root starred with both bat and ball as England secured a thrilling five-wicket victory over Sri Lanka in the second ODI, leveling the one-day international series.

England chased down Sri Lanka’s total of 219 with 22 balls to spare, thanks to Root’s crafty 75 off 90 balls and crucial bowling that wrapped up the Sri Lankan innings in dramatic fashion. The win keeps the series alive and sets the stage for an exciting decider in the third ODI.

You can read the full original article on 8jj.com here:
👉 Joe Root Stars As England Beat Sri Lanka In 2nd ODI
